## Summary
<!-- A clear, concise description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include any relevant output or benchmarks. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo test` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` produces no warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt` has been run
- [ ] If this affects performance, `cargo bench` output is included in the description
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No proprietary code, API keys, or internal Araskova endpoints are included
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated (for significant changes)
